summary: Bounds recursive JSON search, fully escapes path segments, escapes MCP orchestration path params, and avoids multipart retry body copies.
reason: Greptile review identified hardening opportunities in the generated Twelve Labs workflow, MCP orchestration, and client code. These changes reduce adversarial-response stack risk, prevent malformed path IDs with special characters, avoid agent-supplied MCP path/query injection through orchestration endpoints, and avoid duplicating large upload bodies during retries.
validated_outcome: The Twelve Labs package still passes gofmt, go test, go vet, go build, govulncheck, publish-package verification, supply-chain scan, skill verification, manifest verification, and git diff whitespace checks.
